'''rapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xenogeneically|xenogeneically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xenogeneically|xenogeneically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:rapate|rapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rapatesher|rapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rapatesherĂ«m|rapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rapatero|rapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rapateshĂ«|rapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rapateshĂ«m|rapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirapatero|gokirapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirapateshĂ«|gokirapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirapateshĂ«m|gokirapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorapankerom|gorapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorapankeshĂ«|gorapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorapankeshĂ«m|gorapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorapankeya|gorapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rapaterom|rapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rapatemu|rapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rapateya|rapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirapaterom|gokirapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirapatemu|gokirapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirapateya|gokirapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:rapapate|rapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rapapatesher|rapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rapapatesherĂ«m|rapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rapapatero|rapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rapapateshĂ«|rapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rapapateshĂ«m|rapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirapapatero|gokirapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirapapateshĂ«|gokirapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirapapateshĂ«m|gokirapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorapapankerom|gorapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorapapankeshĂ«|gorapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorapapankeshĂ«m|gorapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorapapankeya|gorapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rapapaterom|rapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rapapatemu|rapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rapapateya|rapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirapapaterom|gokirapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirapapatemu|gokirapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirapapateya|gokirapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠpĂŠte|rĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠpĂŠtesher|rĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠpĂŠtero|rĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠpĂŠtero|gokirĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠpĂŠterom|rĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠpĂŠtemu|rĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠpĂŠteya|rĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠpĂŠterom|gokirĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠpĂŠteya|gokirĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafpafte|rafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafpaftesher|rafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafpaftesherĂ«m|rafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafpaftero|rafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafpafteshĂ«|rafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafpafteshĂ«m|rafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafpaftero|gokirafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafpafteshĂ«|gokirafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafpafteshĂ«m|gokirafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafpafnkerom|gorafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafpafnkeshĂ«|gorafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafpafnkeshĂ«m|gorafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafpafnkeya|gorafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafpafterom|rafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafpaftemu|rafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafpafteya|rafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafpafterom|gokirafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafpaftemu|gokirafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafpafteya|gokirafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
